latest_revealing_findings: Pencil Code Yin-Yang source provides an independent hard L/re-chart implementation.
Yin-Yang transform is self-inverse and orientation/norm-preserving in the audited Cartesian map.
Vector fields require chart-basis transfer before interpolation; scalar fields do not.
Gap/cap MPI routines perform boundary completion before coherent aggregation.
Projection-loss gate now includes chart-basis and interpolation metadata as retained state.
open_blockers: latest active Phase selector/floor source from HDD
